title: Rename device - new name on the FMD connected card
scenario: Renamed device name does not update on the connected card in the Find My Device screen after renaming in Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device card to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field and rename the device (e.g., change to 'My Poly Headset')
Tap on Find My Device (FMD) option
Observe the device name displayed on the connected card in the FMD screen
expected: The new device name (e.g., 'My Poly Headset') is correctly displayed on the connected card in the Find My Device screen.
